query: Generate and validate a vtk.js sphere scene with browser evidence vtk.js Sphere Baseline Keep the scene minimal, deterministic, and compatible with the canonical browser-validation workflow.
recommendedPatterns: Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict.
Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation.
Use a minimal sphere or cone scene to re-establish canvas rendering before restoring custom logic.
Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk.
Build the scene in source -> mapper -> actor -> renderer order.
failureFixPairs: If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command.
If the canvas is missing, reduce the page to a known-good bootstrap scene and compare new artifacts.
When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic.
If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first.
Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable.
If streamline output is empty, inspect seed generation and pipeline ordering before general browser repair.
generationPrompt: Generate vtk.js code for the requested scene while preserving a deterministic browser-validation path. Scene kind: generic. Use these retrieval-backed patterns: Expect screenshot, console log, page error log, and a structured render verdict. | Treat browser evidence as the acceptance contract for vtk.js scene validation. | Use a minimal sphere or cone scene to re-establish canvas rendering before restoring custom logic. | Inject the vtk.js browser bundle before any module script that references global vtk. | Build the scene in source -> mapper -> actor -> renderer order. | Always call renderer.resetCamera() before renderWindow.render().. Avoid regressions captured by these failure-fix hints: If artifacts are missing, rerun the canonical Docker workflow instead of improvising a different browser command. | If the canvas is missing, reduce the page to a known-good bootstrap scene and compare new artifacts. | When the page says vtk is not defined, restore the runtime script include before changing scene logic. | If validation fails early, retry with the minimal full-screen bootstrap scene first. | Capture artifact expectations per benchmark case so later eval output stays comparable. | If streamline output is empty, inspect seed generation and pipeline ordering before general browser repair.. Acceptance contract: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification. | The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render(). | Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png. | The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors..
acceptanceChecks: The scene should create a visible canvas during browser verification.
The script should end with renderer.resetCamera() followed by renderWindow.render().
Browser evidence should include render-verification.json, browser-console.json, page-errors.json, and render-screenshot.png.
The browser console and page error logs should stay free of runtime errors.
